title: Emami is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Emami is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
